---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-13"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Check if all extracted/ QC papers marked as such in the Progress tracker are in the respective subfolders under Boris, Jabesh, Judy, Charity; 
# Identify which paper is misplaced 

Action: 
# Communicate findngs to the team
# place paper correctly (manually)

```{r}

```
